title: anil flavicans
intro: Anil flavicans, also known as Ailanthus altissima, is a deciduous tree native to Asia, commonly referred to as the tree of heaven. The tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anil flavicans include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Anil flavicans include tea and infusions made from its leaves and bark, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
